strengths: Clear value proposition: 'Verify Once. Trust Forever.'
Privacy-first messaging is distinctive and quotable
Technical accuracy: SHA-256, client-side hashing, OP_RETURN
FAQ schema with 6 Q&A pairs aids AI snippet generation
weaknesses: No blog or long-form content for AI to cite
Missing meta description — critical for AI snippet extraction
No author bylines or E-E-A-T signals for expertise
Single page site limits topical authority signals
No comparison content (vs competitors, vs alternatives)

crawler_access.notes: All AI crawlers explicitly allowed. Excellent crawler access policy.

issues: Reads as marketing copy, not LLM-specific guidance
No authentication examples or request/response schemas
Missing formal ## section headers per llms.txt standard

weaknesses: Single-page site — no content depth or topical clusters
No case studies, testimonials, or social proof
No blog, guides, or educational content
No team/about page for E-E-A-T expertise signals
No press mentions or media coverage

strengths: Robots.txt well-configured with all AI crawlers allowed
weaknesses: No Open Graph or Twitter Card meta tags detected

missing: WebSite schema with SearchAction (for sitelinks search)
Article schema (when blog content is added)

google_aio.notes: FAQ schema helps. Missing structured how-to content and comparison pages that trigger AI Overviews.

chatgpt.notes: GPTBot allowed. Needs more citable long-form content. llms.txt needs improvement.

perplexity.notes: PerplexityBot allowed. Clean site structure. Lacks citation-worthy deep content.

gemini.notes: Google-Extended allowed. Thin content reduces Gemini citation likelihood.

bing_copilot.notes: No Bing-specific optimizations. Missing IndexNow protocol.

quick_wins: Add Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags
Expand sitemap.xml with all indexable pages
Upgrade llms.txt to formal standard with API docs and section headers
medium_term: Launch blog with 5-10 foundational articles on credential verification
Add case studies or testimonials for social proof
Create comparison pages (Arkova vs manual verification)
strategic: Build topical authority cluster: credential verification, academic fraud, blockchain anchoring
Pursue press coverage and thought leadership (guest posts, podcasts)
Create YouTube explainer content for AI video citation
Implement IndexNow for faster Bing/Copilot indexing
Add speakable schema for voice search optimization
